title: Shard manifest (large-dataset partitioning — Workstream B)
description: The manifest a DETERMINISTIC sharder (a script, not an LLM) emits for a judgment-heavy pass over a dataset far larger than one unit's 32K budget (references/data-partitioning.md). Each shard is a shard_id -> LOCATOR (a by-reference handle: path/glob/query/key-range/URL — NEVER the raw data), so map units touch data by reference and verifiers re-run+diff on the same locator. Optional results_index + sampling_log form the aggregate ledger that replaces 10k linear units/<id>/ dirs while preserving 'everything is written down' (data-partitioning.md §7 migration note). NOT auto-run against a run by validate_run.py; it is the schema a partitioned run validates its manifest against.

grain.description: The natural partition grain the sharder used (rows->hash/range, docs->per-doc/group, logs->time windows, categories->by class).

sharder.description: The deterministic (non-LLM) script/command that produced this manifest. Deterministic so the partition is reproducible and a verifier can re-derive which locator a shard id points at.

shards.description: One entry per shard. The map wave is ONE brief template applied over this array (parametric wave), not N hand-written briefs.

locator.description: The by-reference handle to the shard's data. NEVER the data itself — that stays on disk/DB.

ref.description: The handle: a path, glob, SQL query, key range, or URL a map unit reads and a verifier re-reads.

count.description: Optional: number of records in this shard.

stratum.description: Optional: stratification label used by stratified sample-verify.

results_index.description: Optional AGGREGATE results table (the aggregate-ledger index): one row per shard, replacing 10k linear units/<id>/ dirs. Addressable as manifest.shards[shard_id] -> results_index[shard_id].

partial_ref.description: Locator of the COMPRESSED partial the map unit emitted (a reduction, not a copy).

verified.description: true iff a verifier re-ran the bounded op on this shard's locator and diffed the partial.

sampling_log.description: Honesty record: what was verified exhaustively vs sampled vs dropped. No silent truncation — a partial pass that reads as 'covered everything' is the failure mode.

excluded.description: shard_ids NOT individually verified — surfaced, never hidden.
